title: IRS Impersonation Scam via Email
description: Scammers sending emails claiming to be from the IRS demanding immediate payment via gift cards to avoid arrest. The emails contain official-looking logos and fake case numbers.
summary: Fake IRS emails demanding gift card payments to avoid arrest.
suggested_action: Do not respond. The IRS never contacts via email. Report to phishing@irs.gov.
reason: Impersonates government agency demanding urgent payment.

title: Netflix Phishing - Account Suspension
description: Email claiming Netflix account will be suspended due to payment failure. Links to fake login page requesting credit card and personal information.
summary: Fake Netflix suspension email leading to credential harvesting.
suggested_action: Never click links in unexpected emails. Log in directly through netflix.com.
reason: Attempts to steal Netflix credentials and payment information.

title: Microsoft Tech Support Phone Scam
description: Callers claiming to be from Microsoft reporting viruses on computer. Request remote access and payment for fake technical support services.
summary: Fake Microsoft support demanding payment for non-existent viruses.
suggested_action: Hang up immediately. Microsoft never calls unsolicited for tech support.
reason: Exploits technical fear to gain remote access and money.

title: Local Bank Data Breach - Customer Information
description: Regional bank reports unauthorized access to customer database containing names, addresses, account numbers, and social security numbers.
summary: Local bank breach exposing sensitive customer financial information.
suggested_action: Monitor accounts for suspicious activity. Consider credit freeze. Contact bank for breach details.
reason: Direct exposure of financial and personal data increases fraud risk.

title: Downtown Parking Garage Break-ins
description: Series of vehicle break-ins at downtown municipal parking garage. Thieves targeting electronics, packages, and valuables left in cars.
summary: Vehicle break-ins increasing at downtown parking garage.
suggested_action: Remove valuables from cars. Use secure parking. Report suspicious activity.
reason: Pattern of thefts indicates organized targeting of parked vehicles.

title: Apache Log4j Remote Code Execution (CVE-2021-44228)
description: Critical vulnerability in Apache Log4j allows remote code execution. Exploits actively scanning for vulnerable servers worldwide.
summary: Critical Log4j vulnerability enabling remote server takeover.
suggested_action: Update Log4j to version 2.17.0 or higher immediately. Scan for indicators of compromise.
reason: Widespread vulnerability with active exploitation in the wild.

title: Amazon Prime Text Message Scam
description: SMS messages claiming Amazon Prime account issues with links to fake login pages. Messages contain order numbers and urgent language.
summary: Fake Amazon Prime SMS scam harvesting credentials.
suggested_action: Never click links in unexpected texts. Check Amazon account directly.
reason: Uses brand recognition and urgency to trick users.

title: Social Security Administration Impersonation
description: Phone calls claiming SSA benefits suspended due to suspicious activity. Request personal information and payment to reactivate benefits.
summary: Fake SSA calls threatening benefit suspension for personal data.
suggested_action: SSA never calls for personal information. Contact SSA directly at official number.
reason: Exploits fear of losing essential benefits to steal personal data.

title: Lottery Winner Scam - Jamaican Lottery
description: Letters and emails claiming recipient won Jamaican lottery. Request payment for taxes and fees before prize can be released. No prize exists.
summary: Fake lottery scam demanding payment for non-existent prizes.
suggested_action: Never pay to collect lottery winnings. Legitimate lotteries don't require upfront fees.
reason: Advanced fee fraud using lottery theme to exploit hope.

title: Hospital Data Breach - Patient Records
description: Regional hospital network reports ransomware attack compromising patient records including medical histories, insurance information, and social security numbers.
summary: Hospital ransomware breach exposing sensitive patient data.
suggested_action: Monitor for medical identity theft. Review insurance statements. Contact hospital for breach notification.
reason: Healthcare data highly valuable for identity theft and fraud.

title: Suspicious Person Near Elementary School

summary: Suspicious activity reported near elementary school.
suggested_action: Report to school administration and local police. Be aware of surroundings.
reason: Unusual behavior near children warrants immediate attention.

description: Fake TikTok verification emails with links to steal account credentials. Targets content creators and business accounts.
summary: Fake TikTok verification stealing creator and business account credentials.
suggested_action: Verify through official TikTok app. Never click verification links in emails.
reason: Creator accounts valuable for followers and promotional content.

title: Immigration Services Impersonation
description: Calls claiming from immigration agencies requiring immediate payment for processing fees. Uses threats of deportation.
summary: Fake immigration calls demanding payment under deportation threats.
suggested_action: Immigration agencies communicate via official mail. Verify through official government websites.
reason: Exploits immigration fears for urgent payment extraction.

title: Fake Credit Repair Services Scam
description: Online ads promising instant credit repair requiring upfront fees. No actual credit repair services provided.
summary: Fake credit repair scam charging upfront fees with no service.
suggested_action: Legitimate credit repair follows legal processes and doesn't guarantee instant results.
reason: Exploits desire for quick credit improvement for advance fee fraud.

title: Telecommunications Provider Data Breach
description: Major telecom company breach exposing customer account information, call records, and payment data.
summary: Telecom breach exposing customer accounts, call records, and payment data.
suggested_action: Change account passwords. Monitor call records for unauthorized access. Review payment methods.
reason: Combined account access and communication data creates high fraud risk.

title: Suspicious Activity Near Public Library
description: Individuals observed taking photos of library visitors and license plates in parking lot. Asking unusual questions about library usage patterns.
summary: Suspicious surveillance at public library targeting visitors.
suggested_action: Report to library staff and police. Inform other library patrons.
reason: Information gathering pattern may indicate planning for theft or fraud.

title: Microsoft Exchange Server Vulnerability (CVE-2024-XXXX)
description: Critical remote code execution vulnerability in Microsoft Exchange Server. Allows complete email system compromise.
summary: Exchange Server vulnerability enabling email system takeover.
suggested_action: Apply Microsoft security patches immediately. Isolate affected servers. Monitor for unusual email activity.
reason: Email system compromise exposes all organizational communications.

title: LinkedIn Premium Account Phishing
description: Fake LinkedIn premium upgrade offers with steep discounts. Links steal account credentials and payment information.
summary: Fake LinkedIn premium offers stealing credentials and payment data.
suggested_action: Upgrade LinkedIn through official platform only. Never click discount links in emails.
reason: Professional network credentials valuable for business impersonation.

title: Veterans Benefits Impersonation
description: Calls claiming from Veterans Administration offering new benefits requiring personal information and payment processing fees.
summary: Fake VA calls stealing personal information and charging processing fees.
suggested_action: VA communicates via official mail. Verify benefits through official VA website.
reason: Exploits veterans' trust in VA for personal data theft.
